note: Lane 0d completed successfully. Rewrote tools.ts to split the global semaphore into read/write pools (10/3), added bridge-level span enrichment with tool.type attributes, and propagated per-tool config fields through registry.ts. Encountered two key learnings: (1) Lane 0a's concurrent changes to tool.ts wrap() already handle per-tool timeout, semaphore, and retry — had to simplify my bridge code to avoid duplication. (2) DurationInput doesn't exist in effect@4.0.0-beta.66 causing pre-existing errors in Lane 0a's tool.ts changes.
